messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_

Great image! Let me analyze this bedroom and build the quote.

**What I see:**
- **Window**: Large 3-panel grid window (approx. 72"W × 60"H), inside mount, currently bare — needs drapery treatment
- **Style**: Elegant transitional/traditional bedroom, neutral grays
- **Headboard**: Upholstered tufted headboard (King size, nailhead trim detail) — currently existing but we can quote a custom version
- **Recommendation**: Pinch pleat or ripplefold drapery in a linen/gray tone to match the aesthetic

Opening the QuoteBuilder now with all details pre-filled! 👇

```tool
{"tool": "open_quote_builder", "customer_name": "", "customer_email": "", "customer_phone": "", "customer_address": "", "project_name": "Master Bedroom — Drapery & Headboard", "rooms": [{"name": "Master Bedroom", "windows": [{"name": "Main Window", "width": 72, "height": 60, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "pinch-pleat", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "decorative-rod", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "inside"}], "upholstery": [{"type": "headboard", "size": "king", "style": "tufted", "fabric": "velvet", "details": "Nailhead trim, tufted pattern, King size — matches existing bedroom aesthetic"}]}]}
```

upholstery.details: Nailhead trim, tufted pattern, King size — matches existing bedroom aesthetic
